headline: Three channels live — now it's about reps and data.
read: We went from zero to a real multi-channel machine: Facebook (posts + Reels + $7/day retargeting), YouTube Shorts, and an SEO/AEO blog led by the 'Is Angi Worth It?' pillar + calculator. Everything's still in warm-up, so the audience numbers will look small until ~mid-July — that's expected. The foundation is the win; now we need volume and the first real performance signal.
next_move: Ship reps across all three channels and watch what lands first. Priority: expand the Angi/pricing SEO cluster (each post doubles as a Short script), keep the Reels + Shorts cadence, and start mining real contractor quotes from FB comments for the phase-2 EEAT. First hard read comes from the Monday report.
